symbols: ruined buildings — the collapse of human civilization and habitation
fire and flames — consuming judgment and total destruction
dark swirling sky — cosmic upheaval and divine wrath
beam of light — a piercing shaft amid devastation, possibly divine agency
dead or burning tree — life extinguished, the end of fruitfulness
dark spheres in the sky — ominous portents and signs in the heavens
broken fences — the dissolution of order and boundaries
description: A chaotic landscape of destruction dominated by fire and ruin. A partially collapsed stone building stands in the right foreground, flames licking at its walls and smoke rising. Behind it, a widespread conflagration burns across the horizon, casting an intense orange-red glow. The sky is a turbulent mass of reds, purples, and oranges, with dark circular shapes floating ominously. A sharp beam of light cuts diagonally from the upper left down toward the ground. A tree with golden-yellow foliage stands against the dark smoke on the right. The terrain is barren and scarred.
